title: Consolidated Restaurant Operations, Inc. ransomware incident

extortion.description: Consolidated Restaurant Operations, Inc. (CRO) operates more full-service and franchise restaurants internationally in addition tocatering events.We are ready to upload 38gb of corporate documents. Scans of employee documents (Passports, driver licenses, medical information, SSNs and other docs), lots of confidentiality agreements, detailed financials, NDAs, police reports, etc.
